strategy: Team fight. Hit with Death (he resists Life). He is damage-immune under an Invulnerability aura until his three Enthralled Villagers die.
Focus and kill all three Villagers first, AoE clears them together. The aura cannot be removed by replacing it (Attenuate and the like will not drop the immunity).
The round after the last Villager falls he casts Frenzy and drops his invulnerability, this is your only window. He hits harder under Frenzy, so shield up.
You have about three rounds (including his Frenzy round) before he re-summons the Villagers and re-shields, so have the whole team pre-bladed to burst the moment he is vulnerable.
Supports blade the hitter and Feint him during the Villager clear, the healer keeps everyone up through Frenzy, then the hitter dumps one massive Death hit inside the window.
cheatNotes: Round 1 he summons three Enthralled Villagers and an indefinite Invulnerability aura, he cannot be damaged until all three Villagers are dead.
You can overwrite the aura slot with a negative aura, but the Invulnerability effect itself will not come off, you must kill the Villagers.
The round after the last Villager dies he Frenzies and loses invulnerability. Kill him within about three rounds or he re-summons the Villagers and re-shields, burst him fully bladed in that window.
